name: AMARIN CORP PLC\UK
summary: - Government Regulation Pharmaceutical Pricing and Reimbursement for further details. In many countries outside the U.S., government-sponsored healthcare systems are the primary payors for drugs. With increasing budgetary constraints and differing views on or challenges in valuing medicines, governments and payors in many countries are applying a variety of measures to exert downward price pressure.
